title: neea choriophylla var. hirtella
intro: Neea choriophylla var. hirtella, also known as the hairy Neea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Neea choriophylla var. hirtella can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
